mapper.insert: insert into comments(id, body, user_id, article_id, created_at, updated_at) values ( #{comment.id}, #{comment.body}, #{comment.userId}, #{comment.articleId}, #{comment.createdAt}, #{comment.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, body, user_id, article_id, created_at, updated_at from comments where article_id = #{articleId} order by created_at desc
